query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       se.id AS station_event_id,
       se.productId,
       p.productCode,
       p.batchNo,
       p.serialNumber,
       p.imei,
       se.categoryId AS event_category_id,
       p.categoryId AS product_category_id,
       p.importedCategoryName,
       p.importedBrandName,
       p.productName
FROM station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE se.operatorUserId = 750212
  AND se.stationCode = 'B'
  AND se.businessDate IN ('2026-05-07', '2026-05-08')
  AND psd.id IS NULL
ORDER BY se.businessDate DESC, se.id DESC
LIMIT 30;

       se.id AS station_event_id,
       se.productId,
       p.productCode,
       p.batchNo,
       p.serialNumber,
       p.imei,
       se.categoryId AS event_category_id,
       p.categoryId AS product_category_id,
       p.importedCategoryName,
       p.importedBrandName,
       p.productName
FROM station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE se.operatorUserId = 750212
  AND se.stationCode = 'B'
  AND se.businessDate IN ('2026-05-07', '2026-05-08')
  AND psd.id IS NULL
ORDER BY se.businessDate DESC, se.id DESC
LIMIT 30;
